content: • Dx: First imaging for stroke: CT head. • Risk: Most common pneumonia organism: Streptococcus pneumoniae. • Tx: First‑line diabetes drug: Metformin. • Risk: UTI most common pathogen: E coli. • Tx: Asthma rescue medication: Salbutamol.
